name: @meridian/langgraph-checkpoint-cloudflare-d1
description: LangGraph.js checkpoint saver for Cloudflare D1

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --format esm --external '@langchain/*' --external '@cloudflare/workers-types' && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run build
